title: retrieval_result
description: Ranked historical retrieval set for a run (SPEC §7.5, §14.3, §13). v1: minimal ranked list + rationale; empty hits allowed for Phase 0 stubs.

run_id.description: Editorial run id (same as run manifest run_id, SPEC §12.1).

rationale.description: Overall retrieval strategy and why these pieces matter (SPEC §14.3).

ranked_hits.description: Ordered retrieval results (SPEC §7.5). May be empty when archive hooks are not wired.

piece_reference.description: Stable reference to a corpus piece (e.g. relative_to_repo path or piece id).

why_selected.description: Why this piece was retrieved for this run.

feature_summary.description: Optional short summary of salient extracted features.

excluded_candidates.description: Notable near-misses left out of the ranked set (SPEC §14.3).
